start.narrative:
You stood at the edge of the undercity, gazing up at the towering skyscrapers that seemed to pierce the smog-filled sky like shards of glass. Raven leaned against a dumpster, eyes fixed on you.

'Kael, we've got problems.' she said, voice low and urgent. 'Omicron Innovations has sent their best goons to sniff out your hideout. You need to move, now.'

choices.description: Grab Raven and make a run for it
Tell Raven you're not leaving until you've finished planning the next heist
Suggest heading to your safehouse to gather more info on Omicron's plans

node_1a.narrative: You took off with Raven in a wild sprint, dodging pedestrians and leaping over obstacles. You finally reached the safety of your hideout, a cramped warehouse on the outskirts of the undercity.

choices.description: Hack into Omicron's servers to gather intel on their plans
Confront Raven about her motives and trustworthiness
Take a moment to catch your breath and plan the next move

node_1b.narrative: You made a beeline for Omicron's headquarters, hacking through security systems as you went. Inside, you found yourself face-to-face with the corporation's top executives.

choices.description: Try to reason with them and convince them to call off their dogs
Sneak past the guards and make a break for it
Unleash your hacking fury and take down Omicron's system from the inside

node_1c.narrative: You headed to the local black market, where you knew you could find a reliable source for information on Omicron's plans.

choices.description: Meet with a shady dealer who claims to have inside info
Bargain with a street vendor over the price of a rare component
Get into a fight with a rival gang member over territory

goal_ending_1.narrative: With Omicron's plans in hand, you devised a plan to infiltrate their facility and steal the datacore. You snuck past security, avoiding guards and cameras as you went. Finally, you reached the heart of the complex: a server room filled with row upon row of humming servers.

goal_ending_2.narrative: You managed to track down one of Omicron's executives, who was willing to defect and provide you with crucial information about the corporation's plans. With this intel, you were able to rally support from the underground resistance and stage a daring raid on Omicron's headquarters.
